title: Gemini 2.5 Pro Goes GA
summary: Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro is now generally available with a 2M context window, native audio/video output, and 40% better reasoning than 2.0 Ultra.

title: Claude 3.7 Sonnet — Extended Thinking
summary: Anthropic ships Claude 3.7 Sonnet with configurable extended thinking chains up to 128K reasoning tokens. Tops the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard.

title: OpenAI o4-mini: Frontier Reasoning at Mini Prices
summary: o4-mini matches o3 on math and coding benchmarks at 80% lower cost. Available via API with tool use and vision.

title: DeepSeek V3 API Price Drops 60%
summary: DeepSeek slashes V3 API pricing to $0.27/1M input tokens, making it the cheapest frontier-class model available via API.

title: Meta Llama 4 Scout & Maverick Released
summary: Meta's Llama 4 Scout (17B MoE) achieves Llama 3.1 405B quality with 10M token context. Maverick tops GPT-4o on most benchmarks.

title: Mistral Medium 3 — Best European Frontier
summary: Mistral Medium 3 tops MMLU and HumanEval leaderboards for European-hosted models. GDPR-compliant deployment available in EU regions.

title: Anthropic + OpenAI Joint Safety Initiative
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI announce shared frontier safety research, including a joint red-teaming protocol for models above GPT-4-class capability.

title: OpenAI Cuts GPT-4o Pricing Again
summary: Another 30% cut to GPT-4o — input now $1.75/1M tokens. Cached input tokens drop to $0.88/1M.

title: Claude Sonnet 4 Released
summary: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 4 with improved reasoning, 200K context, and 2× faster inference vs Sonnet 3.5.

title: Claude Opus 4 — Most Capable Claude Yet
summary: Anthropic's flagship Claude Opus 4 sets new benchmarks on SWE-bench and reasoning evals. Extended thinking enabled by default.

title: OpenAI o3 Available via API
summary: o3 brings frontier reasoning to the OpenAI API with configurable thinking budget. Outperforms o1 across all reasoning benchmarks.

title: Gemini 2.0 Flash Goes GA
summary: Google's Gemini 2.0 Flash achieves GPT-4o-mini quality at 3× lower latency. Now available in all regions.

title: DeepSeek R1 Open-Sourced
summary: DeepSeek releases R1 as fully open-source, rivaling o1 on math and coding benchmarks at a fraction of the API cost.

title: Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B Surpasses GPT-4o on Code
summary: Alibaba's Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B tops HumanEval and SWE-bench Lite, open-sourced under Apache 2.0.
